rules.name: Apache PHP 403/404
rules.description: Detects requests to PHP files resulting in 403 or 404 status codes in Apache logs

rules.name: Caddy PHP Redirects
rules.description: Detects requests to PHP files resulting in 301 redirects in Caddy logs

rules.name: WordPress Login Attempts
rules.description: Detects repeated failed login attempts to WordPress admin

rules.name: WordPress Registration Attempts
rules.description: Detects multiple WordPress account registration attempts from the same IP

rules.name: SQL Injection Attempts
rules.description: Detects basic SQL injection attempts in URLs

rules.name: WordPress File Probing
rules.description: Detects attempts to access common WordPress files that don't exist
